economic_notes: Band owns government business enterprises including Tano T'enneh Limited Partnership (99.99%), Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation (100%), Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation (100%), and FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (6%). Tano Fuel Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation. Band has $400,000 demand facility and $5,000,000 revolving facility, both unused. Enbridge Membership Distribution of $9,860,000 recorded as expense in Economic Development.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2023. Prior year (2022) comparatives have been restated due to adjustments to income from government business enterprises, CMHC subsidy revenue and rental income. $11,000,000 settlement funds received is a significant one-time non-recurring item. Enbridge Membership Distribution of $9,860,000 recorded as expense under Economic Development is also non-recurring. GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Tano T'enneh Limited Partnership (99.99%), Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation (100%), Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation (100%), FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (6% - no financials received). Only one consolidated subsidiary: CMHC Social Housing Program. No remuneration schedule found in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue $27,177,416 minus total government transfers $10,538,124 = $16,639,292 (includes GBE income, band generated, FNHA, other indigenous org, interest, donations, admin fees, net of deferred revenue transfer).
